REGISTER: mseccfg
NUMBER: 0x747
MODE: M-mode
WIDTH: 64
FIELDS: 63..34=WPRI, 33..32=PMM, 31..10=WPRI, 9..9=SSEED, 8..8=USEED, 7..3=WPRI, 2..2=RLB, 1..1=MMWP, 0..0=MML, UNKNOWN..UNKNOWN=MLPE
EXTENSIONS: H, Smepmp, Smmpm, Zicfilp, Zkr
RULE 10: Software may determine whether seed CSR access can be enabled in U and S mode by writing 1 to the sseed and useed bits of mseccfg and then reading back the values.
